What's on at

Cathcart UF.

Special events, activities and gatherings

🗓️ Sunday service Sundays at 11am
⏰ Midweek Wednesdays at 10:30am
🎉 Off the CUF 1st Saturday monthly
📅 Full calendar View calendar
🗓️

Upcoming Events

Here you will find details of special events and activities coming up at Cathcart United Free Church and in our wider community. For our regular weekly meetings please see the Visit page.

June 2026

6 Jun

Prayer Breakfast

⏰ 8:30am–10am 📍 Cathcart United Free Church

Our monthly joint Prayer Breakfast with Cathcart Church of Scotland and Cathcart Baptist Church. Breakfast is served from 8:30–9am followed by a time of prayer together around a theme. Topic TBA.

All are welcome.

6 Jun

Off the CUF

⏰ 10:30am–12pm 📍 Cathcart United Free Church

Our monthly café-style gathering exploring a theme that speaks to our shared human experience. Food, Friendship and Faith — free and open to all. Children welcome, under the responsibility of a parent or carer.

Find out more about Off the CUF →
28 Jun

Love Your Church — Sunday Service

⏰ 11am 📍 Cathcart United Free Church

We continue our series looking at the early church in Acts 1–12. This Sunday we will be exploring the second chapter of the book Love Your Church by Tony Merida — what it means to be a welcoming church.

Over the coming months we are encouraging people to read the book and discuss it with others. Once a month in the Sunday morning service we'll take up one of the eight themes:

  • Belonging (26th April) ✓
  • Welcoming (31st May) ✓
  • Gathering (28th June) ✓
  • Caring (30th August)
  • Service (27th September)
  • Honouring (25th October)
  • Witnessing (29th November)
  • Sending (3rd January 2027)

July 2026

4 Jul

Prayer Breakfast

⏰ 8:30am–10am 📍 Cathcart United Free Church

Our monthly joint Prayer Breakfast with Cathcart Church of Scotland and Cathcart Baptist Church. Breakfast is served from 8:30–9am followed by a time of prayer together around a theme. Topic TBA.

All are welcome.

4 Jul

Off the CUF

⏰ 10:30am–12pm 📍 Cathcart United Free Church

Our monthly café-style gathering exploring a theme that speaks to our shared human experience.

Food, Friendship and Faith — free and open to all. Children welcome, under the responsibility of a parent or carer.

Find out more about Off the CUF →

September 2026

3 Sept

Alpha Course

📅 3 September 2026 – 3 December 2026 📍 Cathcart Church of Scotland

A new Alpha course is starting in September at Cathcart Church of Scotland.

Dates

  • Starts: Thursday 3rd September
  • Ends: Thursday 3rd December
  • Holy Spirit Day: Saturday 7th November

To learn more about Alpha visit their web site.

Find out more →
—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
🔄

Regular Activities

As well as the special events listed above, we have a number of regular activities running throughout the year:

  • Sunday and Wednesday services
  • Monday prayer meetings
  • Fellowship groups, Moments Café, Quiet Spaces and Renew Wellbeing
  • Off the CUF — first Saturday of every month
📅
